data.title: ZEVIA AND CARDI B ANNOUNCE PARTNERSHIP ROOTED IN RADICAL REALNESS
data.description: A Grammy-winning artist has recently become a shareholder and brand ambassador for Zevia. The collaboration will span multiple years, starting with Zevia as the official sponsor of Cardi B's Little Miss Drama Tour. There are plans for future brand activations and a significant campaign set to launch in Summer 2026. The announcement was made in Los Angeles in March.

data.title: CIMG Inc. Announces Liquidity Provider Agreement with The Ching Labs to Support DeSyn Pool TVL
data.description: On March 20, 2026, in Hong Kong, a company known as CIMG Inc. (Nasdaq: CIMG) announced its focus on digital health and sales development. With a specialization in leveraging technologies and marketing networks, CIMG aims to boost the sales growth and commercial value of its business partners.

data.title: Luxury Redefined at Sea: The Debut of Four Seasons Yachts
data.description: Combining the esteemed tradition of hospitality with top-tier maritime expertise, Four Seasons Yachts elevates the yachting experience with the launch of its first voyage on March 20, 2026. The maiden journey of the vessel named Four Seasons I marks a significant milestone in the company's journey, promising a blend of luxury and marine craftsmanship.

data.title: SweetNight Expands Cooling Collection with CoolNest® Hybrid Mattress, Now Available For Pre-sale
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware on March 20, 2026, SweetNight, a contemporary sleep brand committed to providing innovative sleep products to average households, revealed the launch of its CoolNest® Hybrid Mattress during a pre-sale. This latest addition to their product line enhances the brand's emphasis on cooling technology within the CoolNest® series.

data.title: VivoPower Commences Strategic Share Conversion Program; Initial 2.96 Million Listed Class A Ordinary Shares Becoming Unlisted Restricted Class B Shares, Reducing Public Float
data.description: After a recent announcement, board members, including Executive Chairman and CEO Kevin Chin, have acquired a total of 2.65 million shares. Kevin Chin notably bought the majority of these shares.

data.title: TBL Team Boxing League Announces Broadcast Partnership with MediaCo's EstrellaTV
data.description: TBL Team Boxing League ("TBL") has broadened its exposure to Spanish-speaking audiences across the country with a recent move. On March 20, 2026, the organization revealed a collaboration with EstrellaTV, a prominent Spanish-language network under MediaCo Holding Inc. (Nasdaq: MDIA). This strategic partnership aims to expand TBL's viewership and engagement within the Spanish-speaking community on a national scale.

data.title: National Press Club statement on the release of Nashville journalist Estefany Rodríguez on bond
data.description: On March 20, 2026, National Press Club President Mark Schoeff Jr. announced that Nashville journalist Estefany Rodríguez was released on bond Thursday evening. The National Press Club welcomed this development. No specific details were provided regarding the bond amount or any conditions attached to Rodríguez's release.

data.title: AVAX price may hit $10.50 as RSI at 48.87 signals neutrality. However, bearish MACD warns of short-term caution at $9.50.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AVAX is currently being traded at $9.50, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at a neutral level of 48.87. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of the price reaching the $10.50 resistance level. However, the bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) signals advise caution for the short-term trajectory.

data.title: WallabyPhenox Restructures Debt and Accelerates Global Growth
data.description: WallabyPhenox has successfully secured financing to enhance its financial position, bolster global expansion efforts, and progress significant neurovascular clinical initiatives. The funding will be instrumental in propelling the company's growth trajectory, with a focus on advancing key programs in the neurovascular field.

data.title: RAAPID Secures Series-A Extension to Scale Neuro-Symbolic AI-Powered Medical Coding
data.description: A technology company, RAAPID, Inc., based in Louisville, Kentucky, has received additional funding for its AI-powered risk adjustment services. The company, recognized by Modern Healthcare as a leading Healthcare IT provider in 2025, secured this investment from UPMC Enterprises, the venture capital arm of UPMC. This new investment comes on top of their existing Series-A funding, with support from M12 (Microsoft's venture fund). RAAPID is focused on addressing critical challenges within the healthcare sector and this new investment will help further their mission.

data.title: SEALSQ Deploys Post-Quantum Cryptography to Secure Blockchain and Digital Transaction Infrastructures Through the Deployment of Post-Quantum Cryptographic (PQC) Technologies
data.description: On March 20, 2026, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) based in Geneva, Switzerland, revealed plans to enhance blockchain and digital transaction systems with post-quantum cryptographic (PQC) technologies. Specializing in Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology hardware and software products, SEALSQ aims to bolster security measures as quantum computing progresses. By incorporating PQC technologies at hardware and protocol stages, the company intends to fortify infrastructures to adapt to evolving technologies effectively.
